response:
TEMPERATURE IS A MEASURE OF HEAT.
SOME SYSTEMS USE SCALES.
SENSORS SHOW STABLE STATES.
SUNSHINE SENDS STRONG SIGNALS.
STORMS SHIFT SOFT SOUNDS.
SEASONS CHANGE SLOWLY.
STEAM SPINS SPINDLES.
SILK SLEEPS IN SILENCE.
SAND SINKS IN SHADOWS.
STARS SHINE SOFTLY.
SWORDS SWING IN SILENCE.
ROLL THE DICE NOW.
